summary.lv: Ubiquiti Rīgas R&D meklē vecāko UI/UX dizaineri ar 4+ gadu pieredzi tīmekļa, desktop un mobilo lietotņu dizainā un spēcīgām Figma prasmēm.
summary.en: Ubiquiti's Riga R&D team is hiring a Senior UI/UX Designer with 4+ years of experience designing web, desktop and mobile interfaces and strong Figma skills.
